# amiApiAI
> AI API Documentation & Testing Companion — dual-engine verified

## What is amiApiAI?
amiApiAI is a dual-engine AI companion for API developers. Two AI models (Grok + DeepSeek) cross-verify every answer — documentation, debugging, schema design, and test planning you can ship with confidence.

## Features
- OpenAPI/Swagger documentation generation
- Response debugging and error analysis
- REST/GraphQL/gRPC schema design
- Test suite planning (happy path, edge cases, security)
- API security review (OWASP API Top 10)
- Performance optimization advice

## Architecture
- Dual-engine: Grok 4.5 (xAI) + DeepSeek
- Anti-confabulation: trigram-cosine concordance >= 0.45 required
- Stateless: code processed in real-time, never stored

## Compliance
- EU AI Act (Reg. 2024/1689) Art. 50 — limited-risk, full transparency
- GDPR (Reg. 2016/679) — minimal data, no code storage

## Links
- Website: https://amiapiai.com
- API: https://amiapiai-api-production.up.railway.app
- Contact: hello@amiapiai.com
